sentences.english: I clean my apartment every single day.
I can't relax in a messy space.
I only do a big clean on the weekends, and during the week things pile up.
sentences.korean: 주말에만 대청소를 하고 주중에는 물건이 쌓여요.

sentences.english: I'm honestly pretty messy, and my room is always a disaster.
sentences.korean: 솔직히 꽤 지저분하고 방은 항상 엉망이에요.

sentences.english: I know where everything is though.
sentences.korean: 하지만 모든 게 어디 있는지는 알아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Mixer #81 — Morning Person or Night Owl
